idea-plugin.name: Cursor IME HUD
idea-plugin.description:
Cursor IME HUD displays the current Chinese/English IME state in JetBrains IDEs.

输入法状态提示: shows the current input mode in the status bar so Chinese developers can avoid typing in the wrong mode.

This first JetBrains MVP is Windows-only and reuses the lightweight Rust WinImeWatcher.exe helper from the VS Code/Cursor extension. It reads only IME/layout state and does not capture typed text, clipboard data, or file contents.

macOS and Linux support are not included in this JetBrains MVP.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Initial Windows-only JetBrains MVP scaffold.
  • Status bar IME indicator, refresh/toggle/diagnostics actions, settings, and Rust helper protocol parser.

action.text: Cursor IME HUD: Refresh IME State
Cursor IME HUD: Toggle Caret HUD
action.description: Toggle the caret-adjacent IME HUD setting
